Rule.name: Ascension-Rule-OPA-PermissionsGroupSelectionPolicy
Rule.Description: This Rule for identities should not have more than on role at same time, in violation of a policy that prohibits stale users.

Argument.name: log
Argument.Description: The log object associated with the SailPointContext.

Argument.name: context
Argument.Description: A sailpoint.api.SailPointContext object that can be used to query the database if necessary.
